zh.lifeSummary: 當William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath於1460年出生在英國素福爾可布洛 煙雨 歐克麗時，他的父親Sir Thomas Cornwallis Esquire of Broome40歲，母親Philippe Tyrell35歲。他於大約1485年與Elizabeth Stanford在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉德斯頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1519年11月20日在英國英格蘭素福爾可歐克麗享年59歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可歐克麗聖 尼拉希也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath于1460年出生在英国素福爾可布洛 煙雨 歐克麗时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Cornwallis Esquire of Broome40岁，母亲Philippe Tyrell35岁。他于大约1485年与Elizabeth Stanford在英国英格兰素福爾可拉德斯頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1519年11月20日在英国英格兰素福爾可歐克麗享年59岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可歐克麗聖 尼拉希也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Cornwallis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: regional name for someone from Cornwall, a Normanized form of Middle English Cornwalish. Compare Cornwall .

variants.name: Cornwall
meanings: habitational name from the county of Cornwall, which is named with the Old English tribal name Cornwealas. This is from Kernow (the term that the Cornish used to refer to themselves, a word of uncertain etymology, perhaps connected with a Celtic element meaning ‘horn, headland’), + Old English wealas ‘strangers, foreigners’, the term used by the Anglo-Saxons for British-speaking people.

variants.name: Cornish
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from the county of Cornwall, from Middle English Cornish, Cornysh formed on the analogy of English, which was usually Normanized as Corneys. Not surprisingly, the surname is common in adjacent Devon, but it is also established as far afield as Suffolk and London.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath was born in 1460, in Brome with Oakley, Suffolk, England, his father, Sir Thomas Cornwallis Esquire of Broome, was 40 and his mother, Philippe Tyrell, was 35. He married Elizabeth Stanford about 1485, in Thrandeston, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 20 November 1519, in Oakley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in St Nicholas's Church, Oakley, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath est né en 1460, à Brome with Oakley, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Cornwallis Esquire of Broome, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Philippe Tyrell, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Stanford environ 1485, à Thrandeston, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 20 novembre 1519, à Oakley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à St Nicholas's Church, Oakley, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath 1460 in Brome with Oakley, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Cornwallis Esquire of Broome 40 und seine Mutter Philippe Tyrell 35. Er hat um 1485 in Thrandeston, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Stanford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 20. November 1519 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Oakley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Nicholas's Church, Oakley, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath è nato il nel 1460 nel Brome with Oakley, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Cornwallis Esquire of Broome, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Philippe Tyrell, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Stanford circa 1485, nel Thrandeston, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 20 novembre 1519, nel Oakley, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a St Nicholas's Church, Oakley, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Cornwallis Knight of the Bathが1460年にイギリススフォルクブロメ ウィス オアクリーで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Cornwallis Esquire of Broomeは40歳，母Philippe Tyrellは35歳であった。約1485年にイギリスイギリススフォルクスランデストンでElizabeth Stanfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1519年11月20日にイギリスイギリススフォルクオアクリーで59歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクオアクリースト ニチオラス'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Brome with Oakley, Suffolk, England, Uni: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브롬 위스 클리
ko.St Nicholas's Church, Oakley, Suffolk, E: 영국 수폴크 클리 스트 닉홀아스'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath(이)가 1460년 영국 수폴크 브롬 위스 클리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Cornwallis Esquire of Broome(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippe Tyrell(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스랜데스턴에서 Elizabeth Stanford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1519년 11월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 클리에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 클리 스트 닉홀아스'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath nasceu em 1460, em Brome with Oakley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Cornwallis Esquire of Broome, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Philippe Tyrell, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Stanford aproximadamente 1485, em Thrandeston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de novembro de 1519, em Oakley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em St Nicholas's Church, Oakley, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.Brome with Oakley, Suffolk, England, Uni: бром вит оакли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.St Nicholas's Church, Oakley, Suffolk, E: ст ничолас'с чурч, оакли, суффолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath родился в 1460 г. в местности бром вит оакли, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Cornwallis Esquire of Broome было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippe Tyrell, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Stanford около 1485 г. в местности трандестон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 20 ноября 1519 г. в местности оакли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности ст ничолас'с чурч, оакли, суффолк, Англия.

es.Brome with Oakley, Suffolk, England, Uni: Brome with Oakley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.St Nicholas's Church, Oakley, Suffolk, E: St Nicholas's Church, Oakley, Suffolk, Inglaterra
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath nació en 1460, en Brome with Oakley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Cornwallis Esquire of Broome, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Philippe Tyrell, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Stanford aproximadamente 1485, en Thrandeston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 20 de noviembre de 1519, en Oakley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en St Nicholas's Church, Oakley, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
